project: Beldify — guest cart items added but not shown in frontend (guest_token cart lookup mismatch)

tasks.title: Fix CartController::show() guest cart lookup to filter status=active + latest
acceptance: show() resolves guest cart by guest_token AND status='active' (mirrors addItem firstOrCreate key)
When multiple carts exist for the same guest_token, the most recent active one is returned (->latest('id')->first())
show() still creates a new active cart only when NO active cart exists for the token
New test: guest with an abandoned (non-active) cart + a newer active cart → show() returns the active one with items

tasks.title: Make frontend cart cache guest-safe (don't persist empty-stale state across reloads)
acceptance: fetchCart(false) never serves a stale empty cache for a guest whose backend cart now has items — invalidateCache path already refetches (verify, no regression)
Cart cache is memory-only (Map); confirm it is not persisted to localStorage (root cause is backend, not cache) — document in code comment
No regression in cart-atlas-redesign / guest-shopping-flow tests

tasks.title: Commit fix via git and deploy to production (MyContabo)
acceptance: Commit on a feature branch (no direct main push) with message fix(cart): resolve guest cart not displayed by pinning show() to active cart
git pull on server at /var/local/beldify-monorepo + backend cache:clear
Frontend rebuilt on host (Node 22) and restarted — not inside broken docker-compose
Smoke check: guest add-to-cart → GET /api/cart returns the item (X-Guest-Token stable)

doneCondition: Guest can add an item and see it in /cart without refresh. Existing Cart feature tests pass. Production smoke test green.
